summary: The diff implements all four requirements (REQ-19 through REQ-22) with good coverage. Backend SiteSettings extended with Shopify fields, TypeScript types updated, SiteSettingsSection updated with Shopify subsection, ShopifyImportPanel added, and Shopify Storefront API utility created. Minor gap: the useImportShopifyProduct hook references importShopifyProduct on the backend, but the build request specifies calling addProduct (not importShopifyProduct) to save imported products to the ICP store.

missing_requirements.requirement: Clicking 'Import' on a product card calls addProduct on the backend with the product data
missing_requirements.reason: The diff adds an importShopifyProduct method on the backend and the frontend hook useImportShopifyProduct calls this new method. The build request explicitly requires calling the existing addProduct method to save Shopify products to the ICP store, not a new importShopifyProduct method.

hallucinated_features.description: A new backend actor method importShopifyProduct was added, separate from the existing addProduct method
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request states 'Clicking Import calls the backend addProduct method to save the product to the ICP store.' The diff instead introduces a dedicated importShopifyProduct method with Shopify-specific authorization and shopifyEnabled gating, which was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: A database migration module (migration.mo) was added to handle upgrading existing canister state
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention or require a migration module. While potentially useful in practice, it was not part of the specified requirements.

hallucinated_features.description: A urlParams.ts utility file was added with URL parameter persistence helpers
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request makes no mention of URL parameter utilities. This appears to be an unrelated addition.
